results.title: google-auth
results.description: google-auth is the Google authentication library for Python that provides ability to authenticate to Google APIs using various methods including service accounts, application default credentials, and integration with multiple HTTP libraries.

results.title: GoAuth
results.description: GoAuth is a private authorization service that simplifies adding social login (Google, Yandex, VK ID, Telegram) to applications, providing a unified user data response and handling OAuth complexities.

results.title: GoogleAuth
results.description: GoogleAuth is a Java server library for implementing server-side Time-based One-time Password (TOTP) multi-factor authentication, including creating shared secrets, generating, and verifying TOTP passwords.

results.title: GCP Auth
results.description: GCP Auth is a minimal Rust library for authenticating with Google Cloud Platform using service accounts, supporting various credential retrieval methods.

results.title: Google Cloud CLI Auth
results.description: The gcloud CLI Auth command manages authentication credentials and provides commands for logging in, logging out, and managing access tokens for the Google Cloud CLI.

results.title: OAuth2c
results.description: OAuth2c is a user-friendly command-line tool for interacting with OAuth 2.0 authorization servers, simplifying the process of fetching access tokens with various grant types and client authentication methods.

results.title: oauth2l
results.description: oauth2l is a command-line tool written in Go for working with Google OAuth 2.0, primarily used to fetch and print OAuth 2.0 access tokens for use with other tools and scripts.

results.title: Cloud SQL Proxy
results.description: The Cloud SQL Auth Proxy provides secure connections to Cloud SQL instances with IAM authorization and TLS 1.3 encryption, eliminating the need for manual certificate management.

results.title: Google Sign-In Unity Plugin
results.description: A Unity plugin for the Google Sign-In API, enabling OAuth ID tokens and server auth codes across Android and iOS, with recent updates for Android's CredentialManager and iOS's GIDClientID settings.

results.title: React Oauth Google
results.description: A React library that provides components and hooks for implementing Google OAuth2 authentication, including seamless sign-in, one-tap sign-up, and automatic sign-in, using the Google Identity Services SDK.

results.title: React Native OAuth
results.description: React Native OAuth provides a simple interface for OAuth 1.0 and 2.0 providers like Twitter, Facebook, Google, Github, and Slack in React Native apps.

results.title: Überauth GitHub
results.description: GitHub OAuth2 strategy for Überauth, enabling seamless integration of GitHub authentication into Elixir applications.

results.title: React Native Google Auth
results.description: A React Native library for seamless Google Sign-In integration on iOS and Android, utilizing modern Google APIs like Google Sign-In SDK and Credential Manager for OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect compliance.

results.title: Plugin OAuth2
results.description: A third-party OAuth2 login plugin for Halo 2.0, enabling users to log in via services like GitHub, GitLab, and Gitee, and supporting proxy configurations.

results.title: OpenAuth
results.description: OpenAuth is a standards-based, self-hostable authentication provider for web apps, mobile apps, SPAs, and APIs. It implements OAuth 2.0 and supports various providers and customizable UIs.

results.title: Tinyauth
results.description: Tinyauth is a simple authentication middleware that adds a login screen or OAuth with Google, Github, and other providers to Docker apps, supporting proxies like Traefik, Nginx, and Caddy.

results.title: Better Auth MCP Hono
results.description: An MCP server built with the HONC stack that provides GitHub OAuth authentication via better-auth, deployable as a remote server on Cloudflare Workers.

results.title: Google Cloud IAM
results.description: Google Cloud IAM is an identity and access management service that enables you to manage who has access to Google Cloud resources and what actions they can perform.

results.title: Google Cloud Go Client Libraries
results.description: Go packages for Google Cloud Platform services, providing clients for various Google Cloud APIs with support for multiple authentication methods.

results.title: Google Auth Library for Node.js
results.description: This is Google's officially supported Node.js client library for using OAuth 2.0 authorization and authentication with Google APIs.

results.title: Passport Google OAuth2
results.description: Passport strategy for authenticating with Google using OAuth 2.0 in Node.js applications.

results.title: Überauth Google
results.description: Google OAuth2 Strategy for Überauth.

results.title: OAuth API
results.description: The OAuth API enables requesting market data and managing portfolios for end-users, providing key endpoints for stock bars and trades.

results.title: Google Cloud Armor
results.description: Google Cloud Armor is a security service that provides DDoS protection and Web Application Firewall (WAF) capabilities to safeguard applications and services running on Google Cloud.

results.title: Google Cloud Identity Platform
results.description: This repository provides examples and documentation on configuring Google Cloud Identity Platform to implement web app logins with GitHub, GitLab, Microsoft, and Google.

results.title: Google APIs Client Library for .NET
results.description: Enables access to Google APIs like Drive, YouTube, and Calendar with OAuth2.0 authentication, generating strongly-typed libraries from Google's Discovery API.

results.title: Docker Auth
results.description: Docker Auth is a token-based authentication and authorization server for Docker Registry 2.0, supporting various authentication methods like Google Sign-In, GitHub, LDAP, and databases.

results.title: Google Auth Python Library
results.description: Google Auth Python Library

results.title: Google Cloud API Gateway
results.description: A fully managed service that allows developers to create, secure, and monitor APIs for their backend services, providing a unified entry point for all API traffic.

results.title: GTM AppAuth
results.description: GTMAppAuth enables the use of AppAuth with Google Toolbox for Mac libraries on Apple platforms, providing an implementation for authorizing requests with AppAuth and offering compatibility with GTMOAuth2.
